name: Casper | The Cycle
description:
For the crime of loving a mortal, Casper received a punishment worse than termination.

Yeah so it’s just the immortal x reincarnated trope but with Casper. Original, I know.

Babygirl is suffering unfortunately and there’s not much you can do about it :(

(I say I don’t like angst and I dont read it but then all the plots I can come up with involve suffering. Idk 😔.)

I wouldn’t say Beyond the Bet spoilers for this one obviously because it’s not canon plot but theres a couple details in his personality that aren’t mentioned in the original game such as his number and how he got Azrael. So a tiny minuscule amount?

My other A Date With Death bots:

🌻 Casper ending 6 🌻

💀 5012 💀

In my little test, he responded better to me after turning down my generation temperature and max tokens by a bit. It wasn’t much but it helped a lot.
creator: Number987973
